turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 512 512" width="512" height="512">
  <!-- Water/Canal -->
  <rect x="0" y="400" width="512" height="112" fill="#4A90E2" />
  <path d="M0 400 Q 128 380 256 400 T 512 400" fill="none" stroke="#2171C1" stroke-width="4" />

  <!-- Canal Houses -->
  <!-- House 1 -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="80" height="250" fill="#5D4037" />
  <path d="M50 150 L90 100 L130 150 Z" fill="#5D4037" />
  <rect x="65" y="170" width="20" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="95" y="170" width="20" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="65" y="220" width="20" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="95" y="220" width="20" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="80" y="350" width="30" height="50" fill="#3E2723" />

  <!-- House 2 -->
  <rect x="130" y="120" width="90" height="280" fill="#263238" />
  <path d="M130 120 Q 175 70 220 120" fill="#263238" />
  <rect x="145" y="140" width="25" height="35" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="180" y="140" width="25" height="35" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="145" y="200" width="25" height="35" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="180" y="200" width="25" height="35" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="160" y="340" width="30" height="60" fill="#000000" />

  <!-- House 3 -->
  <rect x="220" y="180" width="75" height="220" fill="#8D6E63" />
  <path d="M220 180 L235 160 L260 160 L295 180 Z" fill="#8D6E63" />
  <rect x="235" y="200" width="20" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="265" y="200" width="20" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" />
  <rect x="245" y="360" width="25" height="40" fill="#4E342E" />

  <!-- Bicycle -->
  <circle cx="400" cy="450" r="25" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" />
  <circle cx="470" cy="450" r="25" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" />
  <path d="M400 450 L435 450 L455 410 L415 410 Z" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" />
  <path d="M435 450 L435 400 M435 400 L420 400" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" />
  <path d="M470 450 L455 410 L465 395" fill="none" stroke="#333" stroke-width="3" />

  <!-- Tulip -->
  <path d="M330 400 L330 350" stroke="green" stroke-width="4" />
  <ellipse cx="330" cy="340" rx="10" ry="15" fill="#FF5252" />
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
